items.title: Governors tackle rising cost of living with relief checks, tax cuts and housing policy
items.description: State officials are hearing voters’ worries about the cost of everyday items such as housing, groceries, utilities and child care

items.title: San Francisco public schoolteachers strike over wages and health benefits
items.description: Some 6,000 public schoolteachers in San Francisco have gone on strike for the first time in nearly 50 years

items.title: Vatican approves Archbishop Fulton Sheen beatification after 2019 ceremony derailed
items.description: The Vatican has approved the beatification of Archbishop Fulton Sheen, a popular U.S. radio and TV preacher

items.title: New video footage released from day of the fatal Brown University shooting
items.description: City officials have released new video footage from the day of the Brown University shooting that killed two students and injured nine others

items.title: Vance is in Armenia, a country no sitting US president or vice president has visited before
items.description: Vice President JD Vance is in Armenia, a country that no sitting U.S. vice president or president has visited before
